fused top-8 overlap, pre-fix vs shipped scan settings — 8000 chunks, 30 queries
pre-fix = hnsw.ef_search=40 + hnsw.iterative_scan=off (pgvector defaults)
shipped = store.Connect's settings (ef_search=100 + iterative_scan=relaxed_order)

CONFIGURATION               RBO  JACCARD    CHANGED NOTE
default scope             0.941    0.985          2 2/30 queries returned different top-8
scope=wide                0.810    0.687         19 19/30 queries returned different top-8
no graph leg              0.962    1.000          0 identical — the fix changes nothing the agent sees here
vector only               0.962    1.000          0 identical — the fix changes nothing the agent sees here
